name: ALBANY INTERNATIONAL CORP /DE/
business: Albany International Corp. designs and manufactures high-performance engineered fabrics for paper machine clothing and engineered fabrics, and composite components for aerospace and defense. Its Machine Clothing segment is the world's leading producer of custom-designed fabrics for papermaking, while its Albany Engineered Composites segment supplies advanced composite parts for aerospace and defense applications.

exposures.sentence: Albany Engineered Composites (AEC) segment is a leader in innovative composite technology solutions and manufacturer of engineered components for demanding aerospace and defense applications.
Albany Engineered Composites (AEC) segment is a leader in innovative composite technology solutions and manufacturer of engineered components for demanding aerospace and defense applications.

AEC provides highly engineered, advanced composite solutions to customers and platforms in the commercial and defense markets, as well as for space-launch vehicles and the emerging advanced air mobility market.

AEC provides highly engineered, advanced composite solutions to customers and platforms in the commercial and defense markets, as well as for space-launch vehicles and the emerging advanced air mobility market.

AEC announced in December 2025 that it had achieved the U.S. Department of War (DoW) Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) Level 2 certification through an accredited CMMC Third-Party Assessment Organization (C3PAO).
The use of emerging technologies by organized cyber criminals, such as artificial intelligence and quantum computing, has increased the range of security threats faced by the Company.

catalysts.event: No meaningful revenue growth from New Business Ventures until 2027
catalysts.sentence: Although we do not expect meaningful revenue growth from New Business Ventures until 2027, the investments we are making today will be a pillar for new innovative product opportunities.

catalysts.event: Reduce energy consumption and Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 50% by 2030
catalysts.sentence: We have a goal of reducing our energy consumption and our associated Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 50% by 2030.

catalysts.event: Zero waste to landfill by 2030 for operations in the Americas and Europe
catalysts.sentence: We have a goal of zero waste to landfill by 2030 for our operations in the Americas and Europe.

catalysts.event: Headquarters consolidation in Portsmouth, NH to continue through first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: This change impacts approximately 100 employees and will continue through the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Board authorized share repurchases up to $250 million
catalysts.sentence: On February 21, 2025, the Company's Board of Directors authorized the Company to repurchase shares up to $250 million, which replaces a prior authorization put in place in 2021.

catalysts.event: Expect to incur additional restructuring expenses into 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to incur additional restructuring expenses related to these actions into 2026.
